title: arabis contracta subsp. sagittata
intro: Arabis contracta subsp. sagittata, also known as Arrowhead, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, characterized by its distinctive arrow-shaped leaves and white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Arabis contracta subsp. sagittata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
